3144780.name: Fantasy Grounds - Fantasy Companion SWADE Adventure Deck Cards
3144780.description:
Fantasy Companion SWADE Adventure Deck Cards

These 4 new Adventure Cards you can add to your existing deck, specially tailored for FANTASY!
To be used with the Savage Worlds Adventure Deck, the Fantasy Companion, and the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition core rules.
This module requires the Savage Worlds Adventure Deck to work. It adds the 4 additional cards for Fantasy to that deck, and will not work without the Savage Worlds Adventure Deck extension loaded.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joe Collins
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
